days.summary: ByteDance Seed surfaced the clearest product artifact of the day with Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview and a new Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM aimed at real-time, interruption-tolerant voice interaction. Zhipu AI expanded its Intel partnership to put Qingyan and CodeGeeX on AI PCs, while new research on transformer hallucinations and billion-parameter interatomic potentials pointed to potentially important advances in model reliability and scientific AI infrastructure.
